title: Coffee Shop Sales Management Dashboard
shortCardDescription: An Excel-based sales analytics dashboard built for a multi-branch coffee shop business to track total sales, customer footfall, average bill, peak order hours, top products, category performance, weekday revenue, and branch-wise sales.
thumbnailAlt: Coffee Shop Sales Management Dashboard Excel analytics portfolio cover
excerpt: An interactive Excel sales dashboard that converts raw multi-branch coffee shop transactions into clear KPIs, product insights, store comparisons, and faster business decisions.
body: ADT SoftTech cleaned, structured, and analyzed multi-branch coffee shop transaction data, then developed an interactive Excel dashboard using pivot tables, pivot charts, slicers, KPI cards, and visual reporting. The solution gives management one clear view of total sales, customer footfall, average bill, peak order hours, category performance, weekday revenue, top products, and store-level results.
galleryAltText: Coffee Shop Sales Management Dashboard displayed inside an Excel workbook with KPI cards, slicers, and sales charts
heroSubheading: An Excel-based sales analytics dashboard for a multi-branch coffee shop business, built to reveal sales trends, customer footfall, product demand, peak ordering hours, and store performance.
heroImageAlt: Coffee Shop Sales Management Dashboard with sales KPIs and branch performance charts
overviewDescription: ADT SoftTech developed a Coffee Shop Sales Management Dashboard for a multi-branch coffee shop business. We organized, cleaned, and analyzed raw transaction data, then built an interactive Excel reporting system with pivot tables, slicers, charts, and KPI cards. The final dashboard helps management understand sales performance, customer footfall, peak order hours, product demand, category contribution, weekday revenue, and branch-wise performance from one screen.
challengeDescription: The client had a large amount of coffee shop sales data, but management could not quickly understand trends or compare performance from raw spreadsheets. Important operational decisions around staffing, stock, promotions, and branches were taking too long and often relied on assumptions.
challengeCards: Daily and monthly sales performance was difficult to track manually
Peak sales hours were not clearly visible for staffing decisions
Branch-wise sales and footfall comparison was time-consuming
Best-selling products, category contribution, and customer order behavior were difficult to identify
solutionDescription: ADT SoftTech cleaned and structured the sales data, created pivot-based summaries, and designed an interactive Excel dashboard that brings the most important business KPIs and trends into one management-ready view.
solutionCards: Cleaned and structured raw multi-branch transaction data
Built pivot tables and pivot charts for sales, product, weekday, and branch analysis
Added month and weekday slicers for faster filtering
Designed KPI cards and visual reporting for faster business decisions
featureBlocks: Total sales, footfall, average bill, and average order KPI cards
Quantity orders by hour for peak-time analysis
Top products and product-detail revenue analysis
resultsText: The dashboard helped the client move from manual spreadsheet checking to a clear, visual reporting process. Management can now identify stronger and weaker sales days, peak ordering hours, best-selling products, category performance, high-performing branches, and customer spending behavior. These insights support better staffing, inventory planning, product promotions, and faster operational decisions.
finalCtaHeading: Want a Similar Dashboard or Analytics Solution?
finalCtaParagraph: ADT SoftTech can help restaurants, coffee shops, retail stores, and e-commerce businesses turn raw sales data into clear dashboards, reports, and insights for better decisions and business growth.

challengeDescription: The client needed a simple but powerful way to understand sales performance without manually reviewing thousands of spreadsheet rows. Key trends, profitable categories, shipping patterns, and regional performance were difficult to analyze quickly from raw order data.
challengeCards: Raw Excel sales records did not provide a clear management overview
Monthly sales and profit trends were difficult to compare manually
Category, subcategory, shipping mode, and regional performance were not visible at a glance

solutionDescription: ADT SoftTech cleaned and structured the sales data, created pivot-based summaries, and built a fully functional Excel dashboard with KPI cards, charts, geographical reporting, and interactive slicers for category, region, and month.

Built Excel pivot tables, pivot charts, and formula-driven summaries
Added category, region, and month slicers for interactive analysis
Designed a clean printable dashboard layout without macros
featureBlocks: Sales, profit, quantity, order, and profit margin KPI cards
Monthly sales and profit trend reporting
Interactive category, region, and month slicers
resultsText: The dashboard helps users move from manual spreadsheet checking to faster, data-driven sales reporting. It makes it easier to identify the strongest sales periods, profitable categories, top subcategories, commonly used shipping modes, regional performance gaps, and overall business health from one interactive Excel report.

title: Super Store Sales Dashboard + 15-Day Forecast
shortCardDescription: A Power BI retail analytics dashboard for tracking sales, profit, quantity, delivery performance, regions, categories, customer segments, payment modes, shipping methods, state-level results, and a 15-day sales forecast.
thumbnailAlt: Super Store Power BI sales dashboard portfolio cover with KPI cards, regional filters, and retail analytics charts
excerpt: An interactive Power BI business intelligence dashboard that combines historical retail sales analysis with a 15-day forecasting model for smarter inventory and revenue planning.
body: ADT SoftTech developed a Super Store Sales Dashboard in Power BI to help retail and e-commerce businesses understand sales performance and prepare for upcoming demand. We cleaned and modeled the data, created DAX-based measures, designed KPI cards and interactive visuals, and added a 15-day sales forecast for short-term revenue and inventory planning.
galleryAltText: Super Store Power BI 15-day sales forecasting dashboard with historical trends, forecast confidence area, and sales by state
industry: Retail · E-commerce · Store Sales · Business Operations
solutionType: Interactive retail analytics and forecasting dashboard
heroSubheading: A Power BI retail business intelligence solution for sales, profit, categories, customer segments, shipping methods, regional performance, and short-term demand forecasting.
heroImageAlt: Super Store Sales Dashboard in Power BI with KPI cards, year-over-year charts, regional filters, and sales breakdowns
overviewDescription: ADT SoftTech developed a Super Store Sales Dashboard in Power BI to give retail and e-commerce teams one executive reporting view for sales, profit, quantity, average delivery days, regional contribution, categories, sub-categories, customer segments, payment modes, shipping methods, year-over-year trends, state-level performance, and a 15-day sales forecast.
challengeDescription: The client had useful retail sales records, but management could not quickly compare regional performance, understand category contribution, review shipping and payment patterns, or use predictive insights for short-term planning from raw data alone.
challengeCards: Sales and profit performance was not visible in one clear dashboard
Regional, category, and sub-category contribution was difficult to compare
Shipping, payment, and customer segment patterns were not easy to monitor
Inventory and revenue planning relied on historical reports without forecasting
solutionDescription: ADT SoftTech cleaned and modeled the retail sales data, created DAX-based measures, designed interactive Power BI visuals and region filters, and implemented a 15-day time-series sales forecast for short-term business planning.
solutionCards: Cleaned and structured raw retail sales data with Power Query
Built DAX-based KPIs for sales, quantity, profit, and delivery days
Added interactive regional, product, segment, payment, and shipping analysis
Implemented a 15-day sales forecast for revenue and inventory planning
featureBlocks: Total sales, quantity, profit, and average delivery day KPI cards
Regional sales contribution and state-level performance reporting
Year-over-year sales and profit trend analysis
Sales breakdowns by segment, payment mode, category, sub-category, and shipping mode
Interactive regional filters for focused analysis
15-day sales forecast with historical trend comparison
Short-term predictive insights for inventory and revenue planning
resultsText: The dashboard helped the client move from manual retail reporting to interactive business intelligence. Management can now review performance across key business dimensions, identify stronger sales areas, compare product and shipping behavior, and use a 15-day forecast to support inventory, promotion, revenue, and operational planning.
finalCtaHeading: Need a Similar Power BI Dashboard for Your Business?
finalCtaParagraph: ADT SoftTech can help you turn raw retail, e-commerce, and sales data into interactive Power BI dashboards, forecasting reports, and business intelligence systems for faster decisions.

title: HR Analytics Dashboard
shortCardDescription: A Power BI workforce analytics dashboard for monitoring employee count, attrition, attrition rate, average age, salary, tenure, departments, education, age groups, salary slabs, and job roles.
thumbnailAlt: HR Analytics Power BI dashboard portfolio cover with attrition KPI cards and workforce charts
excerpt: An interactive Power BI HR analytics dashboard that turns workforce data into clear attrition insights for faster people decisions and retention planning.
body: ADT SoftTech developed an HR Analytics Dashboard in Power BI to help management and HR teams understand workforce attrition from one clear reporting view. The dashboard centralizes employee count, attrition, attrition rate, average age, salary, tenure, departments, gender, education, age groups, salary slabs, years at company, and job-role analysis.
category: Power BI · HR Analytics · Workforce Analytics
industry: Human Resources · Workforce Management · People Operations
heroSubheading: A Power BI workforce analytics solution for employee attrition, demographics, compensation, tenure, departmental performance, and job-role insights.

overviewDescription: ADT SoftTech developed an HR Analytics Dashboard in Power BI to help HR leaders monitor workforce health and understand employee attrition patterns. The dashboard provides a management-ready view of employee count, attrition, attrition rate, average age, salary, tenure, departments, gender, education, age groups, salary slabs, years at company, and job-role trends.
challengeDescription: The HR team had employee records, but the factors contributing to workforce attrition were difficult to review from spreadsheets and disconnected reports. Management needed a clear way to identify high-risk employee groups and make informed retention decisions.
challengeCards: Employee attrition factors were difficult to identify from raw HR records
Department, age group, salary slab, and job-role comparisons were slow
Management lacked a unified view of key workforce KPIs
Retention planning needed clearer, data-driven insights
solutionDescription: ADT SoftTech cleaned and structured the HR data, created workforce KPI measures, and designed an interactive Power BI dashboard with department filters and visual breakdowns for attrition by gender, education, age group, salary slab, tenure, and job role.
solutionCards: Structured and cleaned employee-level workforce data
Built attrition, employee count, salary, age, and tenure KPI cards
Added department-based interactive filtering
Visualized attrition patterns across employee demographics and job roles
featureBlocks: Employee count, attrition, attrition rate, average age, salary, and tenure KPI cards
Department filters for HR, research and development, and sales
Attrition analysis by gender and education
Attrition count by years at company
Job-role attrition breakdown and workforce matrix
resultsText: The dashboard gives HR teams a faster way to understand workforce turnover and prioritize retention planning. It highlights where attrition is concentrated across employee demographics, salary groups, tenure levels, departments, and job roles so management can take focused action.
